topic: A conference paper walkthrough detailing 'NeuroVis: A Graph Neural Network Approach to Mapping Cortical Connectivity,' presenting the experimental results and methodology from the Stanford NeuroAI Lab on fMRI dataset reconstruction.

Evaluating the efficacy of the 'Urban Green Spaces Initiative' in reducing heat island effects in Berlin, drawing on a 5-year longitudinal climatological study from the Humboldt University Environmental Policy Center.
audience: City council members and urban planners

topic: A graduate-level lab module on building parsimonious Bayesian hierarchical models for ecological population forecasting, taught by Dr. Aris Thorne at the Max Planck Institute for Demography.
A literature review synthesizing five seminal papers on fiscal multiplier effects in post-pandemic European economies, assessing variances in sovereign debt response trajectories across the Eurozone.
